_meta.purpose: Schools Pilot — Kids edition (WPK) behaviour library. Read by api/migrate/import_school_behaviours.php at Phase B.
_meta.structure: 72 PERMA-H behaviours (12 per scope/direction set × 6 sets) + 25 generic UP + 25 generic DOWN
_meta.fill_status: STARTER SHAPE — Marty to populate from the source library. Each example below shows the row format; replace the placeholder titles with the actual library text.
notes: qr_token is NOT in this seed — the importer mints a fresh 32-char token per row.
points magnitude defaults from catalogue.default_point_bands by scope; override here only if the activity diverges (rare).
self_scan_enabled: omit to inherit the default per-direction (UP=true, DOWN=false). Override here only when needed.
dimension_key: REQUIRED for scope=ME/WE/US, OMIT for scope=GENERIC.
